prepR4pcm 0.3.0

Suggest fuzzy matches for unresolved species

Source: R/reconcile_suggest.R
reconcile_suggest.Rd

For each unresolved species (present in x but not matched to y), finds the n closest matches in source y using Levenshtein-based similarity. This uses the same component-based approach as pr_fuzzy_match() (genus 0.6, epithet 0.4) but returns the top-n candidates per unresolved name rather than a single best match.

Usage

reconcile_suggest(x, n = 3, threshold = 0.7, quiet = FALSE)

Arguments

x

A reconciliation object.

n

Integer. Maximum number of suggestions per unresolved species. Default 3.

threshold

Numeric (0–1). Minimum similarity score to include a suggestion. Default 0.7.

quiet

Logical. Suppress informational messages? Default FALSE.

Value

A tibble with columns: unresolved, suggestion, score, sorted by unresolved (ascending), then score (descending).

Details

Genus pre-filtering is applied to keep computation tractable for large datasets: only names whose genus is within 2 edits are compared.

Examples

data(avonet_subset)
data(tree_jetz)
result <- reconcile_tree(avonet_subset, tree_jetz,
                         x_species = "Species1", authority = NULL)
#> ℹ Reconciling 919 data names vs 657 tree tips
#> ℹ Matching 919 x 657 names through 2 stages...
#> ℹ Stage 1/4: Exact matching...
#> ℹ Stage 2/4: Normalised matching (0 matched so far)...
#> ℹ Stage 3/4: Synonym resolution (657 matched so far)...
#> ℹ Stage 4/4: Fuzzy matching (657 matched so far)...
#> ✔ Matched 657/919 data names to tree tips
suggestions <- reconcile_suggest(result, n = 2)
#> ✔ Found suggestions for 109 of 262 unresolved species.
head(suggestions, 10)
#> # A tibble: 10 × 3
#>    unresolved                 suggestion               score
#>    <chr>                      <chr>                    <dbl>
#>  1 Acanthiza cinerea          Acanthiza_lineata        0.829
#>  2 Acanthiza cinerea          Acanthiza_inornata       0.75 
#>  3 Acridotheres burmannicus   Acridotheres_grandis     0.782
#>  4 Acridotheres burmannicus   Acridotheres_fuscus      0.746
#>  5 Acridotheres javanicus     Acridotheres_albocinctus 0.746
#>  6 Acridotheres javanicus     Acridotheres_ginginianus 0.746
#>  7 Acridotheres leucocephalus Acridotheres_albocinctus 0.723
#>  8 Acridotheres leucocephalus Acridotheres_cinereus    0.723
#>  9 Acridotheres melanopterus  Acridotheres_cinereus    0.733
#> 10 Acridotheres melanopterus  Acridotheres_albocinctus 0.7
